phase3_findings.description: sub-step 3 summary marker enumeration listed 2 of 3 embed-arm markers (digest-unrecorded omitted) — coupled-site drift introduced in iter 2
event-log delete-leftover-first precondition unpinned (T1/T2 rest on it)

fix_decisions.claim_text: write->dispatch-hash TOCTOU residual window: the write-time digest is captured by re-hashing the on-disk file at dispatch, leaving a millisecond write->dispatch-hash window
fix_decisions.evidence: informational/LOW; both convergence-shadow silent-failure-hunter and Step 3.5 flagged it as below-threshold and NOT a new fail-open introduced by this diff. Full close requires hashing in-memory bytes at write time, which an LLM orchestrator cannot reliably compute (no by-hand SHA-1). Dominant [dispatch-hash->auditor-read] window is closed.

fix_decisions.claim_text: self-check re-gate obligation and retry-precedence ordering unpinned (pr-test gaps sev 3)
fix_decisions.evidence: severity 3, mitigated by step-5 general revise-and-re-gate discipline and the pinned DRAFT-UNREADABLE recovery/termination invariant. Secondary-contract coverage a maintainer MAY add; not a defect. Parked to avoid over-pinning drift.

fix_decisions.claim_text: line ~463 narrative 'sees only the rendered draft' predates the file-arm mechanism
fix_decisions.evidence: conceptually still true; authoritative §11 item 5 fully updated. Optional refresh.
